title: Tretorhiza decumbens
taxonomy: Tretorhiza decumbens is a species within the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Tretorhiza. More specifically, its classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Gentianales, family Apocynaceae, genus Tretorhiza, species T. decumbens.
